description: Investigate a tool library damage incident involving a broken pressure washer (repair cost: $85) that occurred between May 15-20, 2024. Identify the financially responsible party by analyzing the borrowing records and record the findings.

natural_language.prompt: You are the coordinator of a neighborhood tool library. A pressure washer was returned broken - repair costs $85. The borrowing log has inconsistent date formats, missing return dates, and conflicting information. Your task is to: 1) Standardize all date formats, 2) Infer missing return dates from context, 3) Identify who had possession during the damage period (May 15-20, 2024), 4) Calculate fair cost split based on days possessed during damage period, 5) Apply conditional formatting to highlight responsible parties and data issues.
